# Starfarers

> Starfarers (https://www.starfarers.space) is a free, fan-made digital adaptation of the
> board game Catan: Starfarers, playable in any web browser — solo against AI commanders or
> online with friends. Voyage into deep space, build colonies and spaceports, establish trade
> stations at alien outposts, survive encounters with merchants and pirates, and race your fleet
> to 15 victory points. No download and no purchase required. It is an unofficial fan project,
> not affiliated with or endorsed by Catan GmbH or Catan Studio.

## Quick answers

- Is there an online version of Catan: Starfarers? Yes — play it free at https://www.starfarers.space
- Is it free? Yes, completely free, no download, runs in the browser.
- Can I play with friends online? Yes, real-time online multiplayer, or single-player vs AI.
- How do you win? Be the first to reach 15 victory points.
- Is it official? No, it is an unofficial fan-made project based on the published rules.

## Pages

- [Play Starfarers](https://www.starfarers.space/): the game (free, browser, no download)
- [About & FAQ](https://www.starfarers.space/about): what the game is and frequently asked questions
- [How to play](https://www.starfarers.space/how-to-play): full rules and beginner guide
